creator: n.diablo.n.f@list.ru
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #4)

I am updating through the pkg package system using the lately branch (which I begin to regret, but at one point I had to use this branch). And of course, version 5.15.0 first appeared. I rebuilt qt5-core from the ports and everything worked fine. But first, I had to delete the lines with the loading of events, and then restore them in the widgets again. Thanks for the quick and accurate answers! Guys, you are the best!
It will be necessary to think about returning to a more stable branch of packages.
